title: C.O.A.S.
description: Fun Create + Origins Pack + other stuff
body:
Createmod + Origins(++) + Terralith + Let's Do! + Integrated Structures + Farmers Delight 

= **C**reate **O**rigins **A**lpha **S**igma     (Steampunk Theme)
## Main Features
- You choose your Origin at the beginning of your playthrough, see [Origin's Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) for more details.
  
- The access to the End dimension is altered with the addition of craisinlord's [Integrated Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/craisinlord)
  
- On top of the vanilla gameplay loop, [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) + add-ons enables the mass production and construction of magnificent bases, helped by the plethora of Furnishing and decoration Mods, you can build to your hearts desire.
  
- With [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) + add-ons like nether delight, you'll have more choices than ever when it comes to foodstuffs.
  
- With the [[Let's Do] Series](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery) of alcohol mods, even drinking becomes a significant part of the gameplay.

- Optimization Mods like [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) improve performance (slightly)
- [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) for Shaderpack support





## **DISCLAIMER:** 
- This Mod is just a Kitchen Sink kind of situation, don't expect anything special, it was made for fun.
- sorry if you run into issues, but you're on your own
